slides.title:
NetOps vs
NetDevOps is
the *wrong question*
slides.body:
What is a network engineer
when the CLI isn't the job?

slides.title:
Same
destination,
different doors
slides.body:
NetOps automates operations.
NetDevOps learns the network.
One room, two suitcases.

slides.title:
The label
was always
a *proxy*
slides.body: The real question: what is an engineer when typing commands ends?

slides.title:
Value moves
*up the stack*
slides.body: From typing commands to designing the system that types them.

slides.title:
*Judgment*
beats
generation
slides.body: The rare skill: knowing when the AI is confidently wrong.

slides.title:
When the machine
writes the config —
can you tell if
it's right?
slides.body:
Follow *@mzsnetworks* for more on
network automation + AI
